transcript.text: Hi, this is Priya! How can I help you today?
I am looking for a co-working space.
Got it! Are you looking for something short-term or more long-term?
Got it, short-term. Do you have a specific location or neighborhood in mind?
No, I want to know what services do you offer?
Sure! We offer flexible desks, private offices, meeting rooms, and amenities like high-speed internet and coffee. Anything
Both facilities are included in it.
We include high-speed Wi-Fi, printing services, conference rooms, and kitchen access with coffee and tea. Are you looking for any specific
We now have some more questions from the audience.
प्रेकॉर्णिंग कर रहे हैं, जीते हैं आपने तो प्रेकॉर्णिंग कर रहे हैं
Yes, many of our locations provide 24/7 access and secure entry. Would that be important for you?
